problem: Current options-MC artifacts still publish full EV/POP/CVaR metrics even when `data_quality_status=DATA_QUALITY_FAIL: stale_realized_vol` and `allow_trade=false`. This creates a high-risk contract ambiguity: any downstream sorter/alerter that reads headline metrics can mis-rank non-tradable setups and generate profitability-degrading noise during feed outages.

evidence.pattern: Multiple recent artifacts in kb/experiments continue to expose positive headline metrics while DQ fail persists.

required_change: Define a fail-closed output contract for options-MC artifacts: when `data_quality_status` starts with `DATA_QUALITY_FAIL`, set `decision_state=NO_TRADE_DQ_FAIL` and mark quantitative sections as non-actionable.

Redact or nullify action-driving metric fields in DQ-fail mode (`metrics`, `friction_hurdle`, `multi_seed_confidence`, and markdown headline summary values), while preserving diagnostics needed for debugging (`data_quality_status`, reason code, freshness telemetry, canonical input hash).
Add explicit machine-readable guard field `actionable_metrics=false` in JSON and mirrored text in markdown brief.
Enforce downstream-safe ordering: data-quality gate evaluation must run before any metric publication step so no transient actionable metrics leak on DQ fail runs.
Maintain backward compatibility by keeping keys present but nullable in DQ-fail mode, with an added `metrics_redaction_reason` field.
acceptance_tests: Unit test: DQ pass run (`data_quality_status=OK`) keeps full metrics and sets `actionable_metrics=true`.
Unit test: DQ fail run (`DATA_QUALITY_FAIL:*`) sets `actionable_metrics=false`, `decision_state=NO_TRADE_DQ_FAIL`, and redacts/nulls action-driving metric fields while keeping diagnostics populated.
Unit test: markdown output for DQ fail clearly states metrics are non-actionable and does not print EV/POP/CVaR headline values.
Regression test: JSON schema consumers expecting keys do not break (keys remain present, nullable where redacted).
Integration test: replay stale-RV fixture and verify no emitted artifact can be ranked by EV because actionable metric payload is redacted under DQ fail.
constraints: Do not relax existing fail-closed trade gating.
Do not remove diagnostic provenance fields required for incident triage.
Keep contract deterministic and explicitly documented for downstream consumers.
